    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AbstractAvroMessageConverter
    Base class for Apache Avro MessageConverter implementations.
    AbstractBindableProxyFactory
    Base class for bindable proxy factories.
    AbstractBinder<T,C,P>
    Base class for Binder implementations.
    AbstractBinderTests<B,CP,PP>
     
    AbstractBinderTests.Station
     
    AbstractBinderTests.Station.Readings
     
    AbstractBindingLifecycle
    Base implementation of lifecycle operations for BindingService aware Bindables.
    AbstractBindingTargetFactory<T>
    A BindingTargetFactory implementation that restricts the type of binding target to a specified class and its supertypes.
    AbstractExtendedBindingProperties<C,P,T>
    Base implementation of ExtendedBindingProperties.
    AbstractExternalResourceTestSupport<R>
    Abstract base class for JUnit
    invalid reference 
    Rule
    s that detect the presence of some external resource.
    AbstractKafkaBinderHealthIndicator
    Base class that abstracts the common health indicator details for the various Kafka binder flavors.
    AbstractKafkaStreamsBinderProcessor
     
    AbstractMessageChannelBinder<C,P,PP>
    AbstractBinder that serves as base class for MessageChannel binders.
    AbstractMessageChannelBinder.ErrorInfrastructure
     
    AbstractMessageChannelBinder.PolledConsumerResources
     
    AbstractPollableConsumerTestBinder<C,CP,PP>
     
    AbstractTestBinder<C,CP,PP>
    Abstract class that adds test support for Binder.
    AdminClientConfigCustomizer
    Customizer for configuring AdminClient.
    AvroMessageConverterAutoConfiguration
     
    AvroMessageConverterProperties
     
    AvroSchemaMessageConverter
    A MessageConverter using Apache Avro.
    AvroSchemaRegistryClientMessageConverter
    A MessageConverter for Apache Avro, with the ability to publish and retrieve schemas stored in a schema server, allowing for schema evolution in applications.
    AvroSchemaServiceManager
    Manage a Schema together with its String representation.
    AvroSchemaServiceManagerImpl
    Default Concrete implementation of AvroSchemaServiceManager.
    AvroSchemaValidator
     
    BatchCapableRejectAndDontRequeueRecoverer
     
    Bindable
    Marker interface for instances that can bind/unbind groups of inputs and outputs.
    BindableFunctionProxyFactory
    FactoryBean for creating inputs/outputs destinations to be bound to function arguments.
    BindableProxyFactory
    FactoryBean for instantiating the functions.
    Binder<T,C,P>
    A strategy interface used to bind an app interface to a logical name.
    BinderAwareRouter
    Sets a BinderAwareChannelResolver on any bean of type AbstractMappingMessageRouter within the context.
    BinderChildContextInitializer
     
    BinderConfiguration
    Configuration for a binder instance, associating a BinderType with its configuration Properties.
    BinderCustomizer
    The binder customization strategy.
    BinderException
    Exception thrown to indicate a binder error (most likely a configuration error).
    BinderFactory
     
    BinderFactoryAutoConfiguration
     
    BinderHeaderMapper
    Custom header mapper for Apache Kafka.
    BinderHeaderMapper.NonTrustedHeaderType
    Represents a header that could not be decoded due to an untrusted type.
    BinderHeaders
    Spring Integration message headers for Spring Cloud Stream.
    BinderProperties
    Contains the properties of a binder.
    BindersHealthIndicatorAutoConfiguration
     
    BindersHealthIndicatorAutoConfiguration.BindersHealthContributor
    CompositeHealthContributor that provides binder health contributions.
    BindersHealthIndicatorAutoConfiguration.BindersHealthIndicatorListener
    A DefaultBinderFactory.Listener that provides HealthIndicator support.
    BinderSpecificPropertiesProvider
     
    BinderTestEnvironmentPostProcessor
    An EnvironmentPostProcessor that sets some common configuration properties (log config etc.,) for binder tests.
    BinderTestUtils
     
    BinderType
    References one or more Configuration-annotated classes which provide a context definition which contains exactly one Binder, typically for a given type of system (e.g.
    BinderTypeRegistry
    A registry of BinderTypes, indexed by name.
    BinderWrapper
    Holds information about the binder and channel.
    Binding<T>
    Represents a binding between an input or output and an adapter endpoint that connects via a Binder.
    BindingCleaner
    Interface for implementations that perform cleanup for binders.
    BindingCreatedEvent
    ApplicationEvent fired whenever the the Binding is created.
    BindingHandlerAdvise
     
    BindingHandlerAdvise.MappingsProvider
    Provides mappings including the default mappings.
    BindingProperties
    Contains the properties of a binding.
    BindingsEndpoint
    Actuator endpoint for binding control.
    BindingsEndpointAutoConfiguration
     
    BindingService
    Handles binding of input/output targets by delegating to an underlying Binder.
    BindingService.LateBinding<T>
     
    BindingServiceConfiguration
    Configuration class that provides necessary beans for MessageChannel binding.
    BindingServiceProperties
     
    BindingsLifecycleController
    Lifecycle controller for the bindings.
    BindingsLifecycleController.State
    Binding states.
    BindingTargetFactory
    Defines methods to create/configure the binding targets defined by
    invalid reference 
    org.springframework.cloud.stream.annotation.EnableBinding
    .
    BindingUtils
    Binding Utilities.
    BoundTargetHolder
    Holds information about the binding targets exposed by the interface proxy, as well as their status.
    CacheKeyCreatorUtils
    Utility methods related to Output Channel Cache Key.
    CachingRegistryClient
     
    ChannelsEndpoint
    An Endpoint that has the binding information on all the Bindable message channels.
    ChannelsEndpoint.ChannelsMetaData
    Meta data for channels.
    ChannelsEndpointAutoConfiguration
     
    ClientFactoryCustomizer
    Called by the binder to customize the factories.
    CollectionSerde<E>
    A convenient Serde for Collection implementations.
    Compatibility
     
    CompositeMessageChannelConfigurer
    MessageChannelConfigurer that composes all the message channel configurers.
    CompositeMessageConverterFactory
    A factory for creating an instance of CompositeMessageConverter for a given target MIME type.
    ConfluentSchemaRegistryClient
     
    ConsumerConfigCustomizer
    This customizer is called by the binder to customize consumer configuration in Kafka Consumer factory.
    ConsumerConfigProperties
    Configuration properties used to specify Pulsar consumers.
    ConsumerConfigProperties.Acknowledgement
     
    ConsumerConfigProperties.Chunking
     
    ConsumerConfigProperties.Subscription
     
    ConsumerDestination
    Represents a ConsumerDestination that provides the information about the destination that is physically provisioned through ProvisioningProvider.provisionConsumerDestination(String, String, ConsumerProperties).
    ConsumerEndpointCustomizer<E>
    If a single bean of this type is in the application context, an inbound channel adapter created by the binder can be further customized after all the properties are set.
    ConsumerProperties
    Common consumer properties - spring.cloud.stream.bindings.
    ContextStartAfterRefreshListener
    Automatically starts the context after a refresh.
    ConversionException
    Exception thrown when an error is encountered during message conversion.
    CustomMimeTypeConverter
    A custom converter for MimeType that accepts a plain java class name as a shorthand for application/x-java-object;type=the.qualified.ClassName.
    DefaultBinderFactory
    Default BinderFactory implementation.
    DefaultBinderFactory.Listener
    A listener that can be registered with the DefaultBinderFactory that allows the registration of additional configuration.
    DefaultBinderTypeRegistry
    Default implementation of a BinderTypeRegistry.
    DefaultBinding<T>
    Default implementation for a Binding.
    DefaultMessageConverterHelper
     
    DefaultMessageConverterHelper
     
    DefaultPartitioningInterceptor
     
    DefaultPollableMessageSource
    The default implementation of a PollableMessageSource.
    DefaultSchemaRegistryClient
     
    DefaultSubjectNamingStrategy
     
    DeserializationExceptionHandler
    Enumeration for various DeserializationExceptionHandler types.
    DirectHandler
     
    DirectWithAttributesChannel
     
    DlqDestinationResolver
    A BiFunction extension for defining DLQ destination resolvers.
    DlqPartitionFunction
    A TriFunction that takes a consumer group, consumer record, and throwable and returns which partition to publish to the dead letter topic.
    DltAwareProcessor<KIn,VIn,KOut,VOut>
    Custom RecordRecoverableProcessor that is capable of sending the failed record to a DLT during recovery.
    DltPublishingContext
    The DltPublishingContext is meant to be used along with DltAwareProcessor when publishing failed record to a DLT.
    DynamicDestinationsBindable
    A Bindable that stores the dynamic destination names and handles their unbinding.
    EmbeddedHeaderUtils
    Encodes requested headers into payload with format 0xff, n(1), [ [lenHdr(1), hdr, lenValue(4), value] ... ].
    EnableSchemaRegistryClient
     
    EnableSchemaRegistryServer
    Enables the schema registry server enpoints.
    EnableTestBinder
    This annotation enables the Spring Integration Test Binder when applied to a class.
    EncodingDecodingBindAdviceHandler
    ConfigurationPropertiesBindHandlerAdvisor to detect nativeEncoding/Decoding settings provided by the application explicitly.
    ExpressionSerializer
    since 5.0.2 author Oleg Zhurakousky
    ExtendedBindingHandlerMappingsProviderAutoConfiguration
    Auto-configuration for extended binding metadata for Kafka Streams.
    ExtendedBindingHandlerMappingsProviderConfiguration
    Configuration for extended binding metadata.
    ExtendedBindingHandlerMappingsProviderConfiguration
    Auto-configuration for extended binding metadata for the Pulsar binder.
    ExtendedBindingHandlerMappingsProviderConfiguration
    Configuration for extended binding metadata.
    ExtendedBindingProperties<C,P>
    Properties that extend the common binding properties for a particular binder implementation.
    ExtendedConsumerProperties<T>
    Extension of ConsumerProperties to be used with an ExtendedPropertiesBinder.
    ExtendedProducerProperties<T>
     
    ExtendedPropertiesBinder<T,C,P>
    Extension of Binder that takes ExtendedConsumerProperties and ExtendedProducerProperties as arguments.
    FluxMessageChannelBindingTargetFactory
     
    FunctionBindingTestUtils
    A utility class to assist with just-in-time bindings.
    FunctionConfiguration
     
    FunctionConstants
    Interfaces which defines constants used for naming conventions used in bindings of multiple functions or functions with multiple inputs and outputs.
    FunctionDetectorCondition
    Custom Condition that detects the presence of java.util.Function|Consumer beans.
    GenericsUtils
    Internal utilities for handling generics.
    GlobalKTableBinder
    An AbstractBinder implementation for GlobalKTable.
    GlobalKTableBinderConfiguration
    Configuration for GlobalKTable binder.
    GlobalKTableBoundElementFactory
    BindingTargetFactory for GlobalKTable Input bindings are only created as output bindings on GlobalKTable are not allowed.
    GlobalKTableBoundElementFactory.GlobalKTableWrapper
    Wrapper for GlobalKTable proxy.
    HeaderMode
     
    InputBindingLifecycle
    Coordinates binding/unbinding of input binding targets in accordance to the lifecycle of the host context.
    InputDestination
    Implementation of binder endpoint that represents the source destination (e.g., destination from which messages will be received by Processor.INPUT).
    InteractiveQueryService
    Services pertinent to the interactive query capabilities of Kafka Streams.
    InvalidSchemaException
     
    JaasLoginModuleConfiguration
    Contains properties for setting up an AppConfigurationEntry that can be used for the Kafka or Zookeeper client.
    JavaClassMimeTypeUtils
    Handles representing any java class as a MimeType.
    KafkaBinderConfiguration
    G© Kafka binder configuration class.
    KafkaBinderConfiguration.JaasConfigurationProperties
    Properties configuration for Jaas.
    KafkaBinderConfigurationProperties
    Configuration properties for the Kafka binder.
    KafkaBinderConfigurationProperties.CombinedProducerProperties
    An combination of ProducerProperties and KafkaProducerProperties so that common and kafka-specific properties can be set for the transactional producer.
    KafkaBinderConfigurationProperties.Metrics
     
    KafkaBinderConfigurationProperties.Transaction
    Domain class that models transaction capabilities in Kafka.
    KafkaBinderEnvironmentPostProcessor
    An EnvironmentPostProcessor that sets some common configuration properties (log config etc.,) for Kafka binder.
    KafkaBinderHealth
    Marker interface used for custom KafkaBinderHealth indicator implementations.
    KafkaBinderHealthIndicator
    Health indicator for Kafka.
    KafkaBinderHealthIndicatorConfiguration
    Configuration class for Kafka binder health indicator beans.
    KafkaBinderMetrics
    Metrics for Kafka binder.
    KafkaBinderRuntimeHints
    RuntimeHintsRegistrar for the Kafka binder in Spring Cloud Stream.
    KafkaBindingProperties
    Container object for Kafka specific extended producer and consumer binding properties.
    KafkaBindingRebalanceListener
    A rebalance listener that provides access to the binding name consumer object.
    KafkaConsumerProperties
    Extended consumer properties for Kafka binder.
    KafkaConsumerProperties.StandardHeaders
    Standard headers for the message.
    KafkaConsumerProperties.StartOffset
    Enumeration for starting consumer offset.
    KafkaExpressionEvaluatingInterceptor
    Interceptor to evaluate expressions for outbound messages before serialization.
    KafkaExtendedBindingProperties
    Kafka specific extended binding properties class that extends from AbstractExtendedBindingProperties.
    KafkaListenerContainerCustomizer
    Extension of ListenerContainerCustomizer specific to Kafka binder.
    KafkaMessageChannelBinder
    A Binder that uses Kafka as the underlying middleware.
    KafkaMessageChannelBinder.NullObservationRegistry
     
    KafkaNullConverter
    A MessageConverter that supports KafkaNull payloads.
    KafkaProducerProperties
    Extended producer properties for Kafka binder.
    KafkaProducerProperties.CompressionType
    Enumeration for compression types.
    KafkaStreamsBindableProxyFactory
    Kafka Streams specific target bindings proxy factory.
    KafkaStreamsBinderConfigurationProperties
    Kafka Streams binder configuration properties.
    KafkaStreamsBinderConfigurationProperties.Functions
     
    KafkaStreamsBinderConfigurationProperties.StateStoreRetry
     
    KafkaStreamsBinderEnvironmentPostProcessor
    EnvironmentPostProcessor to ensure the sendToDlqAndContinue BiFunction is excluded in core Spring Cloud Function by adding it to the ineligible function definitions.
    KafkaStreamsBinderHealthIndicator
    Health indicator for Kafka Streams.
    KafkaStreamsBinderHealthIndicatorConfiguration
    Configuration class for Kafka-streams binder health indicator beans.
    KafkaStreamsBinderMetrics
    Kafka Streams binder metrics implementation that exports the metrics available through KafkaStreams.metrics() into a micrometer MeterRegistry.
    KafkaStreamsBinderRuntimeHints
    RuntimeHintsRegistrar for the Kafka Streams binder in Spring Cloud Stream.
    KafkaStreamsBinderSupportAutoConfiguration
    Kafka Streams binder configuration.
    KafkaStreamsBinderUtils
    Common methods used by various Kafka Streams types across the binders.
    KafkaStreamsBindingInformationCatalogue
    A catalogue that provides binding information for Kafka Streams target types such as KStream.
    KafkaStreamsBindingProperties
    Extended binding properties holder that delegates to Kafka Streams producer and consumer properties.
    KafkaStreamsConsumerProperties
    Extended properties for Kafka Streams consumer.
    KafkaStreamsExtendedBindingProperties
    Kafka streams specific extended binding properties class that extends from AbstractExtendedBindingProperties.
    KafkaStreamsFunctionAutoConfiguration
     
    KafkaStreamsFunctionBeanPostProcessor
     
    KafkaStreamsFunctionProcessor
     
    KafkaStreamsFunctionProcessorInvoker
     
    KafkaStreamsJaasConfiguration
    Jaas configuration bean for Kafka Streams binder types.
    KafkaStreamsMessageConversionDelegate
    Delegate for handling all framework level message conversions inbound and outbound on KStream.
    KafkaStreamsProducerProperties
    Extended properties for Kafka Streams producer.
    KafkaStreamsRecordInterceptor
    Interceptor invoked for records consumed by the Kafka Streams binder before the user function sees the inbound KStream.
    KafkaStreamsRecordInterceptorContext
    Context for a record intercepted by a KafkaStreamsRecordInterceptor.
    KafkaStreamsRegistry
    An internal registry for holding KafkaStreams objects maintained through StreamsBuilderFactoryManager.
    KafkaStreamsTopologyEndpoint
    Actuator endpoint for topology description.
    KafkaStreamsTopologyEndpointAutoConfiguration
     
    KafkaTopicProperties
    Properties for configuring topics.
    KafkaTopicProvisioner
    Kafka implementation for ProvisioningProvider.
    KafkaTopicUtils
    Utility methods releated to Kafka topics.
    KeyValueSerdeResolver
    Resolver for key and value Serde.
    KStreamBinderConfiguration
    Configuration for KStream binder.
    KStreamBoundElementFactory
    BindingTargetFactory forKStream.
    KStreamBoundElementFactory.KStreamWrapper
    Wrapper object for KStream proxy.
    KTableBinderConfiguration
    Configuration for KTable binder.
    KTableBoundElementFactory
    BindingTargetFactory for KTable Input bindings are only created as output bindings on KTable are not allowed.
    KTableBoundElementFactory.KTableWrapper
    Wrapper for KTable proxy.
    LastSubscriberMessageHandler
    A marker interface designating a subscriber that must be the last.
    ListenerContainerCustomizer<T>
    If a single bean of this type is in the application context, listener containers created by the binder can be further customized after all the properties are set.
    ListenerContainerWithDlqAndRetryCustomizer
    An extension of ListenerContainerCustomizer that provides access to dead letter metadata.
    MessageChannelAndSourceConfigurer
    Configurer for PollableMessageSource.
    MessageChannelConfigurer
    Interface to be implemented by the classes that configure the Bindable message channels.
    MessageConverterConfigurer
    A MessageChannelConfigurer that sets data types and message converters based on BindingProperties.contentType.
    MessageConverterHelperConfiguration
     
    MessageConverterHelperConfiguration
     
    MessageConverterUtils
    Message conversion utility methods.
    MessageSourceBindingTargetFactory
    An implementation of BindingTargetFactory for creating DefaultPollableMessageSources.
    MessageSourceCustomizer<T>
    If a single bean of this type is in the application context, pollable message sources created by the binder can be further customized after all the properties are set.
    MessageValues
    A mutable type for allowing Binder implementations to transform and enrich message content more efficiently.
    MultiBinderPropertiesConfiguration
     
    NewDestinationBindingCallback<T>
    Configure a new destination before it is bound.
    ObjectStringMessageConverter
    A MessageConverter to convert a non-String objects to a String, when expected content type is "text/plain".
    OutputBindingLifecycle
    Coordinates binding/unbinding of output binding targets in accordance to the lifecycle of the host context.
    OutputDestination
    Implementation of binder endpoint that represents the target destination (e.g., destination which receives messages sent to Processor.OUTPUT)
    You can interact with it by calling OutputDestination.receive() operation.
    ParsedSchema
    Stores a Schema together with its String representation.
    PartitionCapableBinderTests<B,CP,PP>
    Tests for binders that support partitioning.
    PartitionHandler
    Utility class to determine if a binding is configured for partitioning (based on the binder properties provided in the constructor) and what partition a message should be delivered to.
    PartitionKeyExtractorStrategy
    Strategy for extracting a partition key from a Message.
    PartitionSelectorStrategy
    Strategy for determining the partition to which a message should be sent.
    PartitionTestSupport
     
    PollableConsumerBinder<H,C>
    A binder that supports pollable message sources.
    PollableMessageSource
    A PollableSource that calls a MessageHandler with a Message.
    PollableSource<H>
    A mechanism to poll a consumer.
    PollableSourceInitializer
     
    PollerConfigEnvironmentPostProcessor
     
    ProducerConfigCustomizer
    This customizer is called by the binder to customize producer configuration in Kafka Producer factory.
    ProducerConfigProperties
    Configuration properties used to specify Pulsar producers.
    ProducerConfigProperties.Batching
     
    ProducerDestination
    Represents a ProducerDestination that provides the information about the destination that is physically provisioned through ProvisioningProvider.provisionProducerDestination(String, ProducerProperties).
    ProducerMessageHandlerCustomizer<H>
    If a single bean of this type is in the application context, a producing message handler created by the binder can be further customized after all the properties are set.
    ProducerProperties
    Common producer properties.
    ProducerProperties.ExpressionSerializer
    Deprecated.
    since 5.0.2 in favor of top level class in the same package
    ProducerProperties.PollerProperties
     
    ProvisioningException
    Generic unchecked exception to wrap middleware or technology specific exceptions.
    ProvisioningProvider<C,P>
    Provisioning SPI that allows the users to provision destinations such as queues and topics.
    PulsarBinderConfiguration
    Pulsar binder Configuration.
    PulsarBinderConfigurationProperties
    @ConfigurationProperties for the Pulsar binder.
    PulsarBindingProperties
    Container for Pulsar specific extended producer and consumer binding properties.
    PulsarConsumerProperties
    Pulsar consumer properties used by the binder.
    PulsarExtendedBindingProperties
    @ConfigurationProperties for Pulsar binder specific extensions to the common binding properties.
    PulsarMessageChannelBinder
    Binder implementation for Apache Pulsar.
    PulsarProducerProperties
    Pulsar producer properties used by the binder.
    PulsarTopicProvisioner
    Pulsar topic provisioner.
    QualifiedSubjectNamingStrategy
     
    RabbitAdminException
    Exceptions thrown while interfacing with the RabbitMQ admin plugin.
    RabbitBinderConfiguration
    Bind to services, either locally or in a cloud environment.
    RabbitBinderConfiguration.CloudProfile
    Configuration to be used when the cloud profile is set.
    RabbitBinderConfiguration.CloudProfile.CloudConnectors
    Configuration to be used when the cloud profile is set, and Cloud Connectors are found on the classpath.
    RabbitBinderConfiguration.CloudProfile.CloudConnectors.OverrideCloudConnectors
    Configuration to be used if spring.cloud.stream.override-cloud-connectors is set to true.
    RabbitBinderConfiguration.CloudProfile.CloudConnectors.UseCloudConnectors
    Active only if spring.cloud.stream.override-cloud-connectors is not set to true.
    RabbitBinderConfiguration.CloudProfile.NoCloudConnectors
     
    RabbitBinderConfiguration.NoCloudProfile
    Configuration to be used when the cloud profile is not set.
    RabbitBinderConfiguration.RabbitHealthIndicatorConfiguration
    Configuration for Rabbit health indicator.
    RabbitBinderConfigurationProperties
     
    RabbitBinderRuntimeHints
    RuntimeHintsRegistrar for the Rabbit binder in Spring Cloud Stream.
    RabbitBindingCleaner
    Implementation of BindingCleaner for the RabbitBinder.
    RabbitBindingProperties
     
    RabbitCommonProperties
     
    RabbitCommonProperties.QuorumConfig
     
    RabbitConfiguration
    Configuration for RabbitTemplate and CachingConnectionFactory.
    RabbitConsumerProperties
     
    RabbitConsumerProperties.ContainerType
    Container type.
    RabbitExchangeQueueProvisioner
    AMQP implementation for ProvisioningProvider.
    RabbitExpressionEvaluatingInterceptor
    Interceptor to evaluate expressions for outbound messages before serialization.
    RabbitExtendedBindingProperties
     
    RabbitMessageChannelBinder
    A Binder implementation backed by RabbitMQ.
    RabbitMessageChannelBinderConfiguration
    Configuration class for RabbitMQ message channel binder.
    RabbitProducerProperties
     
    RabbitProducerProperties.AlternateExchange
     
    RabbitProducerProperties.AlternateExchange.Binding
     
    RabbitProducerProperties.ProducerType
    Determines the producer type.
    RabbitTestSupport
    JUnit
    invalid reference 
    org.junit.Rule
    that detects the fact that RabbitMQ is available on localhost.
    RabbitTestSupport.RabbitProxy
    Test class to allow testing deferred entity declarations when RabbitMQ is down.
    RecordRecoverableProcessor<KIn,VIn,KOut,VOut>
    Custom Processor implementation that is capable of recovering a failed record at runtime.
    RequeueCurrentMessageException
    When using a PollableMessageSource throw this exception to cause the current message to be requeued in the broker so that it will be redelivered on the next poll.
    Schema
     
    SchemaDeletionNotAllowedException
     
    SchemaNotFoundException
     
    SchemaNotFoundException
     
    SchemaReference
    References a schema through its subject and version.
    SchemaRegistrationResponse
     
    SchemaRegistryClient
     
    SchemaRegistryClientConfiguration
     
    SchemaRegistryClientProperties
     
    SchemaRegistryServerApplication
     
    SchemaRepository
     
    SchemaServerConfiguration
     
    SchemaServerProperties
     
    SchemaValidator
     
    SendToDlqAndContinue
    Custom implementation for ConsumerRecordRecoverer that keeps a collection of recoverer objects per input topics.
    ServerController
     
    SkipAndContinueExceptionHandler
    DeserializationExceptionHandler that allows to silently skip deserialization exceptions and continue processing.
    SpelExpressionConverterConfiguration
    Adds a Converter from String to SpEL Expression in the context.
    SpelExpressionConverterConfiguration.AbstractSpelConverter<T>
     
    SpelExpressionConverterConfiguration.BooleanToStringSpelConverter
     
    SpelExpressionConverterConfiguration.NumberToStringSpelConverter
     
    SpelExpressionConverterConfiguration.SpelConverter
    A simple converter from String to Expression.
    SpringIntegrationProperties
    Contains properties for Spring Integration settings.
    Spy
    Represents an out-of-band connection to the underlying middleware, so that tests can check that some messages actually do (or do not) transit through it.
    StandardBatchUtils
     
    StandardBatchUtils.BatchMessageBuilder
     
    StoreQueryParametersCustomizer<T>
    Interface for customizing StoreQueryParameters.
    StreamAnnotationErrorMessages
     
    StreamBridge
    A class which allows user to send data to an output binding.
    StreamFunctionConfigurationProperties
     
    StreamFunctionProperties
     
    StreamOperations
    Basic contract for StreamBridge operations.
    StreamRetryTemplate
    Marker to tag an instance of RetryTemplate to be used by the binder.
    StreamRuntimeHints
    RuntimeHintsRegistrar for the Core in Spring Cloud Stream.
    StreamsBuilderFactoryManager
    Iterate through all StreamsBuilderFactoryBean in the application context and start them.
    StreamUtils
    Utilities for stream components.
    SubjectNamingStrategy
    Provides function towards naming schema registry subjects for Avro files.
    SubjectPrefixOnlyNamingStrategy
     
    SubscribableChannelBindingTargetFactory
    An implementation of BindingTargetFactory for creating SubscribableChannels.
    SupportedBindableFeatures
    Internal abstraction for the supported bindable features.
    TestChannelBinder
    Implementation of Binder backed by the Spring Integration framework.
    TestChannelBinderConfiguration<T>
    Binder configuration backed by Spring Integration.
    TestChannelBinderProvisioner
    ProvisioningProvider to support TestChannelBinder.
    TestUtils
    Copy of class in org.springframework.amqp.utils.test to avoid dependency on spring-amqp.
    TopicInformation
    Record to capture topic information for various binder related tasks.
    UnsupportedFormatException
